untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparing current candle height to maximum of prior 22 candles (lookback window comparison). Allowed indicators do not include a rolling max function or 22-period highest high indicator. Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper) is available but uses different periods and calculation. Signal also requires detection of 'minor high/low within one day' which requires forward-looking logic not supported by backtest engine.
translation_notes: The core requirement—'last candle taller than all prior 22 trading days'—cannot be expressed with available indicators. This would require a custom indicator like highest_high_22 or max_range_22. The retracement exit levels (38%, 50%, 62%) are mentioned but cannot be calculated without pivot point logic. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per the signal (67% success on minor highs in uptrends, 72% on minor lows), but the engine does not support conditional direction logic.
